title: Big news for the monday.com community

posts.author: Carson (Carson Butcher)
posts.cookedHtml:
monday CRM Webinar!

We’re excited to announce an upcoming webinar on March 5th that’s all about unlocking transparency in recruiting workflows with HiringPortal on monday CRM!

Whether you’re a staffing agency, recruiter, search firm, or talent acquisition specialist, one of the biggest challenges is keeping hiring managers and clients aligned throughout the placement process. Lack of transparency, miscommunication, and bottlenecks slow things down, making it harder to fill roles efficiently.

What if you could fix that?

HiringPortal on monday CRM gives your clients real-time access to position pipelines, enabling:
Live status updates so hiring managers stay informed
Seamless collaboration between recruiters and clients
Faster placements by reducing back-and-forth emails
Greater trust through full visibility into the hiring process

In this session, we’ll show you how to leverage monday CRM and HiringPortal to increase placements, improve client experience, and streamline recruiting workflows—all while keeping everything inside monday CRM!

March 5, 2025
1 PM EST
Reserve your spot: carbonweb.co/webinar

If you’re using monday for recruiting, staffing, or hiring management, this is one you won’t want to miss. See you there!

posts.author: shirozayas (Shiro Zayas)
posts.cookedHtml: Amazing! Thanks for sharing! I just registered.
